name: SAL.Gen_Bounded_Definite_Stacks

documentation.description:

Bounded stack implementation, with full Spark verification,
optimized for speed.

tagged_types.name: Stack
tagged_types.code: type Stack (Size : Size_Type) is tagged private;

subtypes.name: Size_Type
subtypes.code: subtype Size_Type is Base_Peek_Type range 0 .. Base_Peek_Type'Last / 2;

documentation.description:
The upper limit is needed to avoid overflow in Peek.
Zero included for Depth result.

subprograms.name: Depth
subprograms.code: function Depth (Stack : in Sgbds.Stack) return Size_Type

documentation.description: Returns current count of items in Stack

subprograms.name: Is_Empty
subprograms.code: function Is_Empty (Stack : in Sgbds.Stack) return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns true iff no items are in Stack.

subprograms.name: Is_Full
subprograms.code: function Is_Full (Stack : in Sgbds.Stack) return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns true iff Stack is full.

subprograms.name: Peek
subprograms.code: function Peek (Stack : in Sgbds.Stack; Index : in Peek_Type := 1) return Element_Type

documentation.description:
Return the Index'th item from the top of Stack; the Item is _not_ removed.
Top item has index 1.

subprograms.name: Pop
subprograms.code: function Pop (Stack : in out Sgbds.Stack) return Element_Type

documentation.description: Remove one item from the top of Stack, and return it.

subprograms.name: Pop
subprograms.code: procedure Pop (Stack : in out Sgbds.Stack; Count : in Base_Peek_Type := 1)

documentation.description: Remove Count Items from the top of Stack, discard them.

subprograms.name: Pop
subprograms.code: procedure Pop (Stack : in out Sgbds.Stack; Item : out Element_Type)

documentation.description: Remove one item from the top of Stack, return in Item.

subprograms.name: Push
subprograms.code: procedure Push (Stack : in out Sgbds.Stack; Item : in Element_Type)

documentation.description: Add Item to the top of Stack.
